label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which book. So, there are five friends: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a specific book: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: Ulysses - Claire: The Fellowship of the Ring - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Now, there are a series of trades. Let me go through each trade step by step and track who has which book. First trade: Claire and Bob swap books. - Claire originally had The Fellowship of the Ring, now she has Ulysses (from Bob). - Bob originally had Ulysses, now he has The Fellowship of the Ring (from Claire). After first trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Ulysses - Dave: Lolita - Eve: Catch-22 Second trade: Claire and Dave swap books. - Claire had Ulysses, now she has Lolita (from Dave). - Dave had Lolita, now he has Ulysses (from Claire). After second trade: - Alice: Moby Dick - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Ulysses - Eve: Catch-22 Third trade: Dave and Alice swap books. - Dave had Ulysses, now he has Moby Dick (from Alice). - Alice had Moby Dick, now she has Ulysses (from Dave). After third trade: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: The Fellowship of the Ring - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Moby Dick - Eve: Catch-22 Fourth trade: Dave and Bob swap books. - Dave had Moby Dick, now he has The Fellowship of the Ring (from Bob). - Bob had The Fellowship of the Ring, now he has Moby Dick (from Dave). After fourth trade: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: Moby Dick - Claire: Lolita - Dave: The Fellowship of the Ring - Eve: Catch-22 Fifth trade: Eve and Dave swap books. - Eve had Catch-22, now she has The Fellowship of the Ring (from Dave). - Dave had The Fellowship of the Ring, now he has Catch-22 (from Eve). After fifth trade: - Alice: Ulysses - Bob: Moby Dick - Claire: Lolita - Dave: Catch-22 - Eve: The Fellowship of the Ring So, at the end of the semester, Dave has Catch-22. Let me check my steps again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First trade: Claire (Fellowship) and Bob (Ulysses) swap, so Claire has Ulysses, Bob has Fellowship. Correct. Second trade: Claire (Ulysses) and Dave (Lolita) swap, so Claire has Lolita, Dave has Ulysses. Correct. Third trade: Dave (Ulysses) and Alice (Moby Dick) swap, so Dave has Moby Dick, Alice has Ulysses. Correct. Fourth trade: Dave (Moby Dick) and Bob (Fellowship) swap, so Dave has Fellowship, Bob
